creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
Created attachment 259614
[PATCH] lang/racket: update to 8.16

Added patches for both racket and racket-minimal to update to latest upstream 8.16. I have also upstreamed the patch referenced in PATCH_SITES, which can be removed in a future release. This patch should also close Bug 278172 and Bug 279163, so once this is merged, please verify and close those bugs as well.
